scheme_name: Financial Assistance to Purchase Outboard Motor of 2HP to 5HP
implementing_department: Department of Fisheries, Government of Goa
description: Subsidy scheme to assist traditional fishermen in purchasing outboard motors (2HP to 5HP) for fishing canoes below 26 feet.
benefits: 50% subsidy up to ₹30,000 for General category (unit cost ₹60,000)
60% subsidy up to ₹36,000 for SC/ST/Women category (unit cost ₹60,000)
Subsidy applicable for only one outboard motor
Benefit can be availed once every 5 years
eligibility: Applicant must be a traditional fisherman by birth or profession
Applicant must be a resident of Goa
Fishing canoe must be registered with Captain of Ports, Government of Goa

steps: Fill application and attach required documents
Submit application at Department of Fisheries or BDO/Sub-Offices
